text: Hello. Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Florida state relief program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? Yes, so I was asking if you've received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan. Oh, okay, great. So the notification has all the details and I just want to help you get everything processed.
